summary: Completed testing of DOMMMA Iteration 10 new features: Moving Quote service, Calendar/scheduling, Contractor Portfolio, PWA support, and AI Roommate Compatibility. Backend APIs 100% working (25/25 tests passed). Frontend UI issues found: Calendar and Portfolio pages fail when user is not logged in (no auth redirect, throws null id error).

minor.issue: Returns 400 when Google OAuth not configured (expected behavior but should have clearer error message)

ui_bugs.issue: Page allows creating events when user is not logged in, then throws 'Cannot read properties of null (reading id)' error
Page allows adding projects when user is not logged in, then throws 'Cannot read properties of null (reading id)' error

integration_issues.issue: User auth check missing - should redirect to login when not authenticated
User auth check missing - should redirect to login when not authenticated

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/moving/pricing-info returns home sizes and pricing config
Backend: POST /api/moving/quote generates quote with cost estimate
Backend: Moving quote with special items increases cost
Backend: Moving quote with packing service increases cost ~40%
Backend: Moving quote floor surcharge applied for stairs without elevator
Backend: POST /api/calendar/events creates calendar event
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events/{user_id} returns user events
Backend: POST /api/calendar/viewing schedules property viewing with listing details
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/events/{event_id} cancels event
Backend: GET /api/calendar/google/status/{user_id} returns connection status
Backend: GET /api/calendar/google/auth-url returns 400 when not configured
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/categories returns 13+ categories
Backend: POST /api/portfolio/project creates portfolio project
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/contractor/{id} returns contractor portfolio
Backend: PUT /api/portfolio/project/{id} updates project
Backend: POST /api/portfolio/project/{id}/feature toggles featured status
Backend: DELETE /api/portfolio/project/{id} soft deletes project
Backend: POST /api/compatibility/calculate/{profile_id} returns compatibility matches
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/matches/{user_id} returns top matches
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/score/{id1}/{id2} returns compatibility score
Backend: Compatibility score has correct structure (breakdown, reasons, level)
Backend: GET /manifest.json returns valid PWA manifest
Backend: PWA manifest has required fields (name, icons, display)
Backend: PWA manifest has 192x192 and 512x512 icons
Backend: POST /api/auth/login creates/returns user
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly
Frontend: Login page with user type selection works
Frontend: Dashboard shows new sidebar links (My Calendar, Moving Quote, Roommate Finder)
Frontend: Contractor Dashboard shows Portfolio link
Frontend: Moving Quote 3-step wizard fully functional (details, services, quote result)
Frontend: Calendar page displays monthly calendar with event types
Frontend: Portfolio page displays Add Project button and modal
action_items: FIX: CalendarPage.jsx - Add authentication check at start, redirect to /login if user is null
FIX: ContractorPortfolio.jsx - Add authentication check at start, redirect to /login if user is null
OPTIONAL: Improve Google OAuth not configured error message in calendar router
critical_code_review_comments: CalendarPage.jsx line 83: handleCreateEvent uses user.id without null check - needs guard or auth redirect
ContractorPortfolio.jsx line 77: handleSubmit uses user.id without null check - needs guard or auth redirect
Both pages should either redirect to login or disable action buttons when user is not authenticated

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Calendar and Portfolio pages need auth fix

seed_data_creation: Created test roommate profiles for compatibility testing: compat-test-a-*, compat-test-b-*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 adds: 1) Moving Quote service at /moving-quote with 3-step wizard - fully working, MOCKED pricing based on Vancouver area distances. 2) Calendar at /calendar with Google Calendar integration - UI works but needs auth check, Google OAuth MOCKED (tokens stored but actual API not called). 3) Portfolio at /portfolio - UI works but needs auth check. 4) PWA manifest at /manifest.json - fully working. 5) AI Compatibility at /api/compatibility/calculate - fully working with basic scoring, AI insights available when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured. Dashboard sidebar updated with new links for all user types.

mocked_services.moving_quote: Uses simulated pricing based on Vancouver area distances - no external API
mocked_services.google_calendar: OAuth flow simulated - tokens stored in DB but actual Google API not called

Moving Quote.ui: 3-step wizard fully functional with estimated costs, truck size, crew size

Calendar.ui: Calendar view and event modal work, but fails when user not logged in

Portfolio.ui: Project list and add modal work, but fails when user not logged in

AI Compatibility.ui: Uses Roommate Finder page from previous iteration
